title: WWW vibe
description: Modpack aimed at vanilla, without magic and mechanisms. So that traveling doesn't seem like an afterthought.
body:
**Modpack is aimed at vanilla, no magic and mechanisms, only travel and beauty of the world. In the world will appear new structures.(overworld, nether, end) You can craft waystone to return from a trip was easier. And new ambient sounds and visual effects will make the world even more lively. Rechiseled will allow you to customize your cabin in a new way. Adds new weapons and armor, as well as another way of enchanting. And new attack animations will make battles more interesting.**
